title: Shaadi.com Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shaadi.com Global Group is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shaadi.com Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shaadi.com Global Group:
Shaadi.com Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shaadi.com Global Group!
